completionRule: Packet 022 merge preview becomes ready only when the packet input copy validates every row as real human input, every packet row maps to the full 1638-row draft, forbidden hits are zero, learnerCitationApproved:false, copiedTextApproved:false, and a separate manual merge/write authorization exists.
boundary: Packet 022 merge preview is dry-run reviewer operations only. It does not write the full source-fit draft, create human judgments, approve copied text, approve learner-facing citations, write lessons, provide stock recommendations, live signals, return promises, broker workflows, automation, real-money guidance, or production readiness.
